description: Cross-binding migration fixtures for v0.1.x -> v0.2.0 (RFC §10.1, §16.1). Each fixture's `input` is a pre-0.2 file carrying `domains.<d>.boundary_conditions`; `expected` is the byte-exact output of the `esm migrate`/`esm-migrate` tool per binding. The migration tool relocates each domain-level BC to model-level, bumps `esm` to 0.2.0, and records provenance.
rule: For each domains.<d>.boundary_conditions[k] (type, dimensions, value?/robin_*?), emit model-level BC entries keyed as '<var>_<kind>_<side>' for every state variable in each matching model; 'periodic' emits only the min side (RFC §9.2.1); remove the domain-level list; bump esm to 0.2.0; append 'migrated_from_v01' to metadata.tags.
